do: Set variant on TabsList and orientation on Tabs; disable individual tabs via disabled on TabsTrigger.
dont: Don't use Tabs for page-level navigation — use navigation-menu.

boundaries: variant values are line (default, underline strip) and badge (pill/segmented). Figma's variant named "default" maps to code value "badge" — a deliberate divergence.
depth on TabsList (1 | 2) is a kit extension with no Figma axis.

whenToUseInstead.when: a compact value switch that isn't showing panels
